purpose: Resolve declared environment variables into typed configuration values with defaults, required checks, and redacted reporting.

endpoints.description: Resolve environment variables from a supplied map and schema descriptor.

sidecar_specification.purpose: Typed environment configuration resolver with secret redaction.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use when a service or tool needs to convert raw environment strings into typed configuration values.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use to fetch secrets from remote secret managers or mutate process.env.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Define spec entries with name, type, required, default, and secret. 2) Call /config/env/resolve with env map. 3) Use values internally and redacted for logs.

failure_modes.symptom: valid false with missing variable error
failure_modes.recovery: Provide the variable or define a default

failure_modes.condition: Value cannot be coerced to requested type
failure_modes.symptom: valid false with type conversion error
failure_modes.recovery: Fix the raw environment value or requested type

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls
Must not log secret values in redacted output

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Resolve from request.env when provided, otherwise process.env. Coerce booleans from true/false/1/0, numbers with Number.isFinite, and json with JSON.parse. Redact secret values in the redacted object only.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Empty string may be intentional for string values but invalid for required numbers and booleans. JSON parsing errors must not throw 500.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Keep resolution pure by passing env into resolveEnv(spec, env) and using process.env only at the route boundary.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not mutate process.env, do not read .env files, and do not print secret values.

test_cases.name: resolve typed values and redact secret
